title: NCRI Iran news brief
snippet: Iran executions: ~30 political prisoners executed since war began, ~50,000 arrested this year. $1.7B cryptocurrency transferred through Binance to Iranian regime-affiliated networks. Iraqi militia commander Mohammad Bagher Saad Dawood Saeedi arrested for plotting 12+ attacks on synagogues/Jewish centers in N. America and Europe. PMOI resistance units in Zahedan resumed activities. Dizel Abad Prison visitation suspended.
tag_reason: 5/17 신규 — 이란 내부 탄압·자금 흐름·테러 연계 다각적 신규 정보
